title: Earnings Call Transcript: Revolve Group Q1 2026 Beats Forecasts
text: Revolve Group delivered Q1 2026 results that beat analyst forecasts on both earnings and revenue metrics. Net sales reached $342.9 million, representing 16% year-over-year growth and surpassing the $334.5 million consensus estimate by 2.51%. Diluted earnings per share of $0.20 exceeded the estimate of $0.19 by 5.26%, continuing the company's streak of beating expectations. Management highlighted strong execution in a dynamic operating environment with persistent macroeconomic uncertainty and geopolitical challenges. Key operational metrics include active customers growing 8% to 2.926 million, cash and equivalents reaching $335.8 million (debt-free balance sheet), and operating cash flow of $49.4 million demonstrating strong cash generation. Strategic initiatives generating traction include REVOLVE Los Angeles, the company's first namesake brand, which launched with significant brand awareness through premium advertising featuring Bella Hadid and generated a 40%+ increase in Revolve search interest year-over-year. The Cardi B beauty partnership exceeded expectations, with Grow-Good Beauty products selling out in less than an hour and accumulating 640,000 Instagram followers. Management maintained confidence in full-year 2026 gross margin guidance of 53.5%-54.0% and reiterated expectations for double-digit revenue growth, supported by the company's multi-year roadmap for new branded assortments.
